acceptance.criterion: A documented doctor command validates exact required tool versions
acceptance.evidence: README.md documents ./scripts/doctor.sh; both uploaded doctor.json reports contain exact expected and actual versions with zero failed checks.

acceptance.criterion: The required verification command fails when Godot is unavailable
acceptance.evidence: A local negative-path run with GODOT_BIN set to a missing executable exited 1 and wrote failed doctor, scenario, and summary JSON reports while completing the remaining checks.

acceptance.criterion: Linux and Windows CI execute all required M0 checks
acceptance.evidence: GitHub Actions run 29463466966 completed successfully; both matrix jobs report doctor, .NET build, xUnit, Ruff, pytest, and Godot smoke as passed.

acceptance.criterion: Failure logs and machine-readable test results are uploaded
acceptance.evidence: Both retained artifacts contain per-step logs, summary.json, doctor.json, an xUnit TRX report, pytest JUnit XML, Godot scenario JSON, and the Godot log. Artifact upload is guarded by always().

artifacts.name: m0-Linux-1
artifacts.validation: Downloaded; summary, doctor, and Godot scenario reports passed.

artifacts.name: m0-Windows-1
artifacts.validation: Downloaded; summary, doctor, and Godot scenario reports passed.
